rows.content: To stop recording, hit Alt M again.   The KEY ASSIGNMENT panel
is displayed, allowing you to define which key you would like this
keyboard macro to be envoked from.  Hit Alt-P.
Now, anytime you hit Alt-P, the PERFORM block will be built at
the cursor position inside the editor.
Keyboard macros only work properly when they are executed in
a context similar to when they were originally recorded.  What
this means is that if you were to execute the above PERFORM
block macro from outside the editor, it would execute, but not
If you are creating a key macro that types a primary command
in the primary command field, you may want to hit the Home
key at the beginning of the macro, to ensure that the cursor
is positioned where you expect it to be at playback.
